## Summary

## Validation

List what was run and what was not run.

```text
# Example

cmake --build --preset verify --target ALL_BUILD
```

## Contract / Schema / Registry Impact

- [ ] No public contract, schema, registry, diagnostic, refusal, command, capability, module, provider, pack, or compatibility surface changed.
- [ ] Public surface changed; relevant contract/schema/registry updates are included.
- [ ] Public surface changed; follow-up is required and explicitly described below.

Notes:

## Determinism / Authority Impact

- [ ] Determinism impact is stated.
- [ ] Relevant invariants are named.
- [ ] Generated outputs are treated as evidence unless explicitly promoted.
- [ ] Planned or blocked features are not described as implemented.
